# Product Requirements Document: Onboarding Flow

## Problem Statement
New users struggle to complete the initial setup process, leading to 40% drop-off in the first week.

## Target Users
- New end users who have just signed up
- Power users migrating from legacy systems

## Key Features
1. Guided onboarding wizard with progress indicators
2. Automated data import from existing systems
3. Personalized setup recommendations based on user role

## Success Metrics
- Onboarding completion rate > 80%
- Time-to-value < 5 minutes
- User satisfaction score > 4.0/5.0
